name: palette/neutral/0
description: Darkest extreme. Pure black for neutral; deepest tint for hues.

name: palette/neutral/10
description: Near-dark. Avoids OLED banding from absolute #000.

name: palette/neutral/25
description: Deep. Text high-emphasis on light surfaces.

name: palette/neutral/50
description: Strong. Body text on light; solid idle on bright themes.

name: palette/neutral/75
description: Mid-dark. Border strong on light; solid idle.

name: palette/neutral/100
description: Midpoint. Placeholder text, disabled controls, max-chroma color.

name: palette/neutral/125
description: Mid-light. Interactive hover on dark themes.

name: palette/neutral/150
description: Light. Raised surface on bright themes; solid idle on dark themes.

name: palette/neutral/175
description: Very light. Base surface on light themes; body text on dark themes.

name: palette/neutral/190
description: Near-light. Avoids banding from absolute #fff.

name: palette/neutral/200
description: Lightest extreme. Pure white for neutral; palest tint for hues.

name: dimension/01
description: Hairline. Sub-rem exception for 1px borders/dividers. (px)

name: dimension/05
description: 2px. Fine border, micro-radius. (px)

name: dimension/10
description: 4px. Base unit. Border-radius small. (px)

name: dimension/15
description: 6px. Compact density variant of `default`. (px)

name: dimension/20
description: 8px. Snug gap. Inner padding of small controls. (px)

name: dimension/25
description: 10px. Border-radius round (cards, panels). Compact-spacious knob. (px)

name: dimension/30
description: 12px. Caption font-size. Compact `default` step. (px)

name: dimension/35
description: 14px. Small body font-size. Compact-spacious knob. (px)

name: dimension/40
description: 16px. One rem. Typography base; default body padding. (px)

name: dimension/45
description: 18px. Large body font-size. (px)

name: dimension/50
description: 20px. Subheading font-size. Spacious `snug` variant. (px)

name: dimension/55
description: 22px. Reserved for fine-grained tuning between 50 and 60. (px)

name: dimension/60
description: 24px. Heading-3 font-size. Loose gap (compact). (px)

name: dimension/70
description: 28px. Reserved tuning step between 60 and 80. (px)

name: dimension/80
description: 32px. Heading-2 font-size. Loose gap (default). (px)

name: dimension/90
description: 36px. Reserved tuning step between 80 and 100. (px)

name: dimension/100
description: 40px. Minimum tap target (WCAG AA 2.2). (px)

name: dimension/120
description: 48px. Spacious `loose` step. Display-small font-size. (px)

name: dimension/160
description: 64px. Display-large font-size. (px)

name: dimension/200
description: 80px. Major hero spacing. (px)

name: dimension/240
description: 96px. Pill radius (always larger than tallest pill control). (px)

name: dimension/320
description: 128px. Hero dimensions. (px)

name: opacity/000
description: 0%. Fully transparent.

name: opacity/004
description: 4%. Faintest tint — cell hover on dense surfaces.

name: opacity/008
description: 8%. Subtle tint — `:hover` mix amount on filled buttons.

name: opacity/016
description: 16%. Soft overlay — disabled-on-light reduction.

name: opacity/024
description: 24%. Light scrim.

name: opacity/040
description: 40%. Medium scrim — disabled control body.

name: opacity/060
description: 60%. Standard backdrop scrim (modals, drawers).

name: opacity/080
description: 80%. Strong dimming.

name: opacity/100
description: 100%. Fully opaque (ergonomic shortcut).

name: font-size/10
description: 12px. Caption: metadata, legal text, table headers. (px)

name: font-size/20
description: 14px. Small body: secondary copy, dense UI, inputs. (px)

name: font-size/30
description: 16px. Default body: reading size. (px)

name: font-size/40
description: 18px. Large body: emphasized paragraphs. (px)

name: font-size/50
description: 20px. Subheading: in-page section labels. (px)

name: font-size/60
description: 24px. Heading-3: within-section titles. (px)

name: font-size/80
description: 32px. Heading-2: major-section titles. (px)

name: font-size/90
description: 36px. Reserved tuning step. (px)

name: font-size/100
description: 40px. Heading-1: page titles. (px)

name: font-size/120
description: 48px. Display-small: hero subtitles. (px)

name: font-size/160
description: 64px. Display-large: hero titles. (px)

name: line-height/10
description: Tight. Display typography, uppercase, monospace blocks.

name: line-height/20
description: Snug. Headings, condensed UI.

name: line-height/30
description: Default. Body text, controls.

name: line-height/40
description: Loose. Long-form reading, prose.

name: line-height/50
description: Airy. Captions on dense layouts.

name: duration/instant
description: Immediate, no transition. (ms)

name: duration/fast
description: Micro-interactions: hover, focus. (ms)

name: duration/moderate
description: Standard UI transitions. (ms)

name: duration/slow
description: Enter/exit: modals, drawers. (ms)

name: duration/slower
description: Expressive transitions, rare. (ms)

name: easing/linear
description: Constant rate. Use sparingly.

name: easing/in
description: Accelerate. Exiting elements.

name: easing/out
description: Decelerate. Entering elements.

name: easing/in-out
description: Standard two-way transition.

name: easing/emphasized
description: Punchy. Expressive entrances.
